description:
TopoCal is open. Import the survey points from C:\Users\Docker\Documents\colorado_foothills_survey.csv (format: Point, X, Y, Z, Code) and measure the horizontal distance in meters between the following point pairs: Pair A (3-17), Pair B (8-22), Pair C (11-35), Pair D (5-41), and Pair E (14-28). Save the results rounded to two decimal places to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\distances.txt using the format:
Pair A (3-17): [distance] m
Pair B (8-22): [distance] m
Pair C (11-35): [distance] m
Pair D (5-41): [distance] m
Pair E (14-28): [distance] m
